questionHtml: Explain the mechanism of the reaction between but-1-ene with hydrogen iodide, using curly arrows to represent the movement of electron pairs.
markschemeHtml:
curly arrow going from C=C to H of HI AND curly arrow showing I leaving ✔

representation of carbocation ✔

curly arrow going from lone pair/negative charge on I– to C+ ✔

2-iodobutane formed ✔

 

Penalize incorrect bond, e.g. –CH–H3C or –CH3C once only.

meta.title: Explain the mechanism of the reaction between but-1-ene with hydrogen iodide, using curly arrows to represent the movement of electron pairs.
